details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: AIRLINE APPROVED CARRIER - With airline-approved design, you can take your pet to go to everywhere. This pet carrier provides two connecting loop handles for balanced carrying as a dual seat belt or luggage strap to secure transport
SAFETY DESIGN - The adjustable shoulder strap help you hands-free carrying and makes it the most safe and convenient pet carrier bag for your travel

DURABLE - This cat carrier is made of durable and lightweight polyester fabric. The four-side mesh will not only give a safe and comfortable travel for your pet, but also easy for you to check on your pet
PORTABLE & FOLDABLE - This dog carrier is easy to carry and store, which has a padded shoulder strap and handles

BOTH SIZES AND WEIGHTS - The mediun cat carrier is designed for small and medium pets within 15" x 9" x 9"(smaller than product) and 15 lbs. Please do not choose your carrier only based on weight. Reference your pets' length and height in selecting a carrier size.

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier to be well-constructed with strong straps and roomy enough for medium-sized cats to turn around. They appreciate its comfort, appearance, and value for money, and say it makes travel easier. The zipper quality receives mixed feedback - while many say the zippers work well, some report broken ones.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: Great carrier with a ton of diversity. It opens on all 4 sides and the top. You can atta h it to luggage, carry it by the handle or shoulder strap....

I just got my bag, it’s wonderful, appears to be good quality, zippers a smooth and I love try std it’s also compact and can be folded down thin and...
...Otherwise, great product and my cat, who is EXTREMELY scared of her old crate and she had no problem with this. Made the very experience a lot easier!

authors_reviews.title: One of the best carriers I’ve ever purchased!
authors_reviews.text: My husband and I have only used our carrier a few times to take her to the vet for her regular check-ups (as a puppy, this is quite a few 🙈) but it is a very sturdy & easy to balance when your fur monster puts more weight on one side than the other. She’s only 9 weeks old in my photo & weighed 2.8 lbs that day (Pomeranian). I don’t recommend folding the carrier when storing it as it may lose it’s ability to stand up on it’s own.. I’m not 100% sure of this but I mean, why not take care of it properly?I really love that there is a screen for her to look out & see what’s going on 3 sides and, as you can see, the front, top, and 2 sides all unzip for easy and/or comfortable access or exit. The side with the screen has 2 zippers, one unzips the entire side (fabric included) for larger entry/exit and the other unzips only the screen. The other side that unzips does not have a screen but it does have a rather large pocket (not stretchy or expanding) that is the width of the carrier. It’s great for treats, papers & small notebooks. You could probably even put your wallet in there but I wouldn’t recommend it… but hey, to each their own 🤷🏻‍♀️ … Continuing on… the strength of the zippers is unbelievable. The teeth are nice, thick & zip/unzip smoothly without catching and the zipper pull is actually metal instead of plastic so it won’t break as easily. I was actually pretty impressed with the quality of all of the zippers.The carrying straps are super strong! I have duffel bags with less strength so even though she’s a chewer, I still don’t see her being able to chew through them with how thick they are. The adding shoulder pad for support is a nice touch too and the shoulder strap is easily adjustable but doesn’t slip when put in place.The back of the carrier does have the strap for putting on top of luggage securely, however, I feel if your fur baby were to get spooked or is active, the carrier could fall off of the luggage and turn around to the other side.. probably hitting you on the back of your legs. So, use your best judgement based on your little buddies activity level & demeanor and just secure it more with some straps or something.The floor of the carrier, now, this was something I was truly worried about when I ordered it. It is by far the one thing I am exceptionally impressed by other than the strength of the zippers. It’s not a super thick & cushy floor but with the Sherpa fleece topping it is soft & makes it to where your pet won’t slip & slide in 500 directions while driving or carrying so it’s still better than a bare floor & it doesn’t bend - I’ve also carried my 15 lb cat in this carrier with no problems. It’s also removable - the majority of the carrier along with the interior is waterproof & machine washable or you could just wipe it down if you don’t have time to wash & air dry but the wood & rubber inside the removable floor is not.Overall, I definitely recommend the carrier for small breeds ONLY!! I wouldn’t overload the carrier as it will probably break/bend somewhere and injure your pet. Please, just read the description about weight, height & length before purchasing because it does matter and makes a difference on how your experience will affect you & your fur baby.
authors_reviews.author: Dara S

authors_reviews.title: Buy it!
authors_reviews.text: I absolutely loved this carrier, and so did my two cats. They each traveled 13 hours in these and did amazing. They had lots of space and looked really comfortable the whole time. The material feels high-quality, it’s sturdy, and it’s super easy to clean, which I really appreciated. Super easy assembly. The pockets on the side were also perfect for storing their treats and other little necessities.Even at home, with all their cat trees, they still go inside these carriers just to lounge. That’s how I know they truly liked them.If you’re looking for a cat carrier, this is the one. Great price for a great product ( don’t mind Bella’s cone she was just spayed )100% cat approved!
authors_reviews.author: Nicole

authors_reviews.title: Great carrier, good value!
authors_reviews.text: Well made, sturdy and colorful (I ordered the purple)! Much easier to handle than a hard sided carrier! Cat is much more comfortable in this carrier. Love it!
authors_reviews.author: mommabrook

authors_reviews.title: Pet carrier
authors_reviews.text: Was very great and it fit under the seat of Alaska airline perfectly! It’s easy to assemble and is very light. It is pretty dark so you won’t see the pet inside that much. Padding is very cozy however it kept moving around during the travel. Zipper is very stable and it locks so pet doesn’t open it. It only opens if we zip or unzip in the correct way. A lot of comments and love for this and my pet! I also like the way it opens from everywhere. The only thing is it could have a net on one of the sides for the pet to see but other than those this is a great choice and very pretty color! It has a shoulder strap as well to carry from there if anyone prefers to carry from that way. A lot of pet carriers don’t. Have these perks. It also has a luggage strap so you can put it on your luggage and have less weight on your hands!!
authors_reviews.author: Nadia Hassan

authors_reviews.title: Nice carrier
authors_reviews.text: Good travel bag. Very roomy for my 8 month kitten, she'll grow into it nicely. Material is a nice canvas type that's easy to clean. Lots of ventilation and a side pockets for treats.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Best on the market! LOVE it!
authors_reviews.text: The best animal carrier I've ever seen! My cat loves it! It's roomy & comfortable and my cat can see outside of it much easier than the other carriers I have.This is a really great buy!
authors_reviews.author: Chelsea

authors_reviews.title: Henkelion Cat Carriers Dog Carrier Pet Carrier
authors_reviews.text: The Henkelion Pet Carrier is a fantastic choice for traveling with pets. It combines comfort and safety with a thoughtful design that's easy for both pets and owners. The interior is cozy, while the sturdy structure gives peace of mind. I love the breathable mesh panels, which keep my cat calm and comfortable. Plus, the adjustable strap makes carrying a breeze. Overall, it's a reliable and convenient option for pet travel!
authors_reviews.author: Dennis V

authors_reviews.title: Quality Pet Carrier
authors_reviews.text: I really like this pet carrier—it’s well-built and made with high-quality materials. I used it to transport my 2-month-old, 1.9-pound puppy, and it was plenty spacious for him. However, the bottom floorboard is quite thin and not very plush. To make it more comfortable, I added the “MidWest Homes for Pets Plush Pet Bed; Ombré Swirl & Cat Bed; Gray 17L x 11W x 1.5H - Inches for Toy Dog Breeds, 40618-SGB, 18-Inch,” which fits perfectly inside the carrier. I wrapped the MidWest Homes pet bed with a couple of layers of puppy pads and simply removed the soiled layer as needed throughout our journey.The carrier fit perfectly under the aisle seat of a Boeing 737-700 aircraft. I appreciate that it can be opened or unzipped from the top, front, and sides, offering flexible access. The pocket on the right side panel provides convenient storage for slim items like collapsible bowls, poop bags, dog pads, and other small essentials. There appears to be metal or another sturdy material sewn into the edges of the side panels and the top front and back horizontal corners, which helps the carrier maintain its shape when zipped properly. I love that this carrier can slide onto a roller suitcase handle which makes it easier to navigate busy airports and to have one less thing to carry around. It also features four small feet underneath for added stability.
authors_reviews.author: KPPR

other_countries_reviews.title: Good quality
other_countries_reviews.text: It is spacious and seemes to be of good quality. It feels very sturdy in hand, but not bulky.Cats like it too.
other_countries_reviews.author: AJAY SINGH

other_countries_reviews.title: Very convenient and the dog loves it
other_countries_reviews.text: The Henkelion Pet Carrier has worked wonderfully for our Biewer Terrier puppy. She absolutely loves it and doesn’t fear being inside it at all, which says a lot about how comfortable and inviting it is. The carrier feels sturdy and well-made, while still being lightweight and easy to move around the house. I found it especially convenient for training purposes, as we can place it in different rooms and let her get used to it naturally. A great bonus is that small hamster or bunny beds fit perfectly inside, making it extra cozy and comfortable as a little pillow. It’s also well-ventilated and easy to carry for trips to the vet or short travels. Overall, this carrier is practical, comfortable, and puppy-approved. I would highly recommend it for small pets up to 15 lbs.
other_countries_reviews.author: Sera-L-L

other_countries_reviews.title: كويسه جدا
other_countries_reviews.text: جميله جدا و عمليه و خامه تحفه
